summary: Tested all 7 targeted Admin Panel UX overhaul fixes. All features verified working correctly via both backend pytest (9/9 pass) and frontend Playwright UI testing. No issues found.

test_results.customers_table_text_sm: PASS - CustomersTab.tsx line 178: Table className='text-sm min-w-[1000px]'. Verified via Playwright: class='w-full caption-bottom text-sm min-w-[1000px]'
test_results.quote_requests_product_filter: PASS - Frontend sends ?product= param (QuoteRequestsTab line 47). Backend regex filters by product_name case-insensitively (server.py line 6238). Tested: 4 rows → 0 rows with nonexistent product filter. Backend tests verified: no-match=0, partial match correct, case-insensitive match works, combined filters work.
test_results.catalog_product_visibility_typeahead: PASS - ProductForm.tsx has pf-vis-search input with placeholder 'Search customer by email…'. Typing 'test' shows 10 options (e.g. 'test_user_033505@test.com — Test Company'). Clicking option adds chip with email text and × remove button. Clear all button present.
test_results.productstab_customer_enrichment: PASS - ProductsTab.tsx lines 82-87 correctly merges user emails into customers array before passing to ProductForm. Typeahead shows real emails.
test_results.article_visibility_typeahead: PASS - ArticlesTab.tsx has article-customer-search input. Selecting 'Specific customers only' radio shows typeahead. Typing 'test' shows 10 customer options. Clicking adds chip ('test_user_033505@test.com ×'). Counter shows '1 customer(s) selected'.
test_results.order_edit_dialog: Context from iter_26 - all fields verified (email typeahead, status, product, payment method, subtotal/fee/total, pay date, subscription ID). No changes needed.
test_results.subscription_edit_dialog: Context from iter_26 - all fields verified (email typeahead, status, amount, payment method). No changes needed.
test_results.customer_edit_country_region: PASS - Edit dialog has 'Region / Province' text input and Country select with 9 options (Australia, Canada, UK, US, NZ, India, Singapore, South Africa, Other). Backend PUT /admin/customers/{id} accepts address_data with country/region fields.

critical_code_review_comments: No critical issues found. All 7 features from the problem statement are correctly implemented.
MINOR: Hydration warning in console - span nested in select/option elements (partner map filter) - cosmetic React warning, does not affect functionality
NOTE from iter_26: SubscriptionsTab table still uses text-xs (minor aesthetic inconsistency vs other tabs using text-sm) - can be fixed independently
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 Admin UX overhaul features verified working: (1) CustomersTab table=text-sm line 178. (2) QuoteRequestsTab product filter sends ?product= to backend which filters by product_name regex. (3) ProductForm.tsx pf-vis-search typeahead with chip UI working. (4) ProductsTab enriches customers with email via userEmailMap. (5) ArticlesTab article-customer-search typeahead working with chips. (6) Orders/Subscriptions edit dialogs verified in iter_26. (7) Customer edit has Region/Province input + Country select. No bugs found this iteration.
